description: Cross-client owner-signed member-roster signature lock. The album owner signs the canonical 106-byte roster transcript (mosaic-domain: 'Mosaic_MemberRoster_v1' || version || album_id || epoch_id_le || roster_version_le_i64 || member_count_le_u32 || sorted([(member_id, role_byte)])) with the per-epoch Ed25519 ManifestSigningSecretKey. The visitor recomputes the transcript from the live members list and verifies the signature against the album's published signing pubkey before rendering role badges (audit 'threat-model C-3 (server-controlled member roles)' / batch C2). Ed25519 (RFC 8032) is deterministic, so Rust, WASM, and UniFFI clients MUST produce the exact signature bytes locked here.

negativeCases.name: tampered-album-id
negativeCases.rationale: Roster is scoped to album_id; a server cross-mounting a roster fails verification.

negativeCases.name: tampered-epoch-id
negativeCases.rationale: Epoch binding prevents replaying a roster from a previous epoch after rotation.

negativeCases.name: tampered-roster-version
negativeCases.rationale: Monotonic version binding prevents rollback of role revocations.

negativeCases.name: tampered-role-byte
mutations: change member X's roleByte from 1 (owner) to 2 (editor)
negativeCases.rationale: Role-escalation attack: server cannot smuggle a different role label under the same signature.

negativeCases.name: added-member
negativeCases.rationale: member_count + per-member bytes are in the signed transcript; a server cannot smuggle additional members.

negativeCases.name: removed-member
negativeCases.rationale: Server cannot hide a member from the visitor's view without invalidating the signature.

negativeCases.name: swapped-member-id
mutations: replace member X with a different member_id but keep the same role byte
negativeCases.rationale: Server cannot substitute another user_id under a role label that the owner signed for a different user.

negativeCases.name: wrong-pubkey
mutations: verify with a different 32-byte pubkey (e.g. all-0x55)
negativeCases.rationale: Cross-key substitution must fail — the visitor only trusts the album's published epoch signing pubkey.

serverBoundOutputs.name: transcriptBytes
serverBoundOutputs.reason: The transcript embeds server-visible fields (album_id, epoch_id, roster_version, member_ids, role_bytes).

serverBoundOutputs.name: signature
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Ed25519 signature is stored in the albums.member_roster_signature column and emitted in album responses.

serverBoundOutputs.name: signerEpochId
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Signer epoch is needed by the visitor to look up the correct pubkey.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: signingSeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: The per-epoch signing seed never leaves the client — only its derived pubkey is published.
